ddls:
CREATE TABLE "volcanoes" (
  "volcano_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volcano */,
  "volcano_number" INTEGER /* Volcano number assigned by the organization */,
  "volcano_name" TEXT /* Name of the volcano */,
  "primary_volcano_type" TEXT /* Primary type of the volcano (e.g., Shield, Stratovolcano) */,
  "last_eruption_year" TEXT /* Year of the last eruption */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the volcano is located */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the volcano is located */,
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subregion where the volcano is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the volcano's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the volcano's location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the volcano in meters */,
  "tectonic_settings_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tectonic settings of the volcano */,
  "evidence_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evidence category of the volcano's activity */,
  "volcano_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the volcano (e.g., conical, oval) */,
  "volcano_size" TEXT /* Size of the volcano (e.g., small, large) */,
  "volcanic_arc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the volcanic arc associated with the volcano */,
  "volcano_status" TEXT /* Status of the volcano (e.g., active, dormant, extinct) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volcano_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volcanoes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volcanoes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volcanoes_subregion_id FOREIGN KEY ("subregion_id") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volcanoes_evidence_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("evidence_category_id") REFERENCES evidence_categories ("evidence_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volcanoes_tectonic_settings_id FOREIGN KEY ("tectonic_settings_id") REFERENCES tectonic_settings ("tectonic_settings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volcanoes_volcanic_arc_id FOREIGN KEY ("volcanic_arc_id") REFERENCES volcanic_arcs ("volcanic_arc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the subregion is located */,
  "subregion_description" TEXT /* Description of the subregion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subregions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tectonic_settings" (
  "tectonic_settings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tectonic setting */,
  "tectonic_setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the tectonic setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tectonic setting */,
  "tectonic_setting_type" TEXT /* Type of tectonic setting (e.g., divergent, convergent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tectonic_settings_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence_categories" (
  "evidence_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evidence category */,
  "evidence_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the evidence category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence category */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence (e.g., radiometric, historical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "major_rocks" (
  "rock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rock type */,
  "rock_name" TEXT /* Name of the rock type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rock type */,
  "rock_type" TEXT /* Type of rock (e.g., igneous, sedimentary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "minor_rocks" (
  "rock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rock type */,
  "rock_name" TEXT /* Name of the rock type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rock type */,
  "rock_type" TEXT /* Type of rock (e.g., igneous, sedimentary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volcano_major_rocks" (
  "vmr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volcano-rock relationship */,
  "volcano_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volcano */,
  "rock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major rock type */,
  "rock_order" INTEGER /* Order of the rock type (1-5) */,
  "rock_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the rock type in the volcano */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vmr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volcano_major_rocks_volcano_id FOREIGN KEY ("volcano_id") REFERENCES volcanoes ("volcano_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volcano_major_rocks_rock_id FOREIGN KEY ("rock_id") REFERENCES major_rocks ("rock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volcano_minor_rocks" (
  "vmn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volcano-rock relationship */,
  "volcano_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volcano */,
  "rock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the minor rock type */,
  "rock_order" INTEGER /* Order of the rock type (1-5) */,
  "rock_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the rock type in the volcano */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vmn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volcano_minor_rocks_rock_id FOREIGN KEY ("rock_id") REFERENCES minor_rocks ("rock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volcano_minor_rocks_volcano_id FOREIGN KEY ("volcano_id") REFERENCES volcanoes ("volcano_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_impact" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population impact record */,
  "volcano_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volcano */,
  "population_within_5_km" INTEGER /* Population within 5 km radius */,
  "population_within_10_km" INTEGER /* Population within 10 km radius */,
  "population_within_30_km" INTEGER /* Population within 30 km radius */,
  "population_within_100_km" INTEGER /* Population within 100 km radius */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density around the volcano */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_impact_volcano_id FOREIGN KEY ("volcano_id") REFERENCES volcanoes ("volcano_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "volcano_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volcano being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the volcano data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the volcano data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_volcano_id FOREIGN KEY ("volcano_id") REFERENCES volcanoes ("volcano_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volcanic_arcs" (
  "volcanic_arc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volcanic arc */,
  "volcanic_arc_name" TEXT /* Name of the volcanic arc */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the volcanic arc */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volcanic_arc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "research_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "volcano_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volcano being studied */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_studies_volcano_id FOREIGN KEY ("volcano_id") REFERENCES volcanoes ("volcano_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "monitoring_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "volcano_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volcano being monitored */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "station_description" TEXT /* Description of the monitoring station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the monitoring station was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_stations_volcano_id FOREIGN KEY ("volcano_id") REFERENCES volcanoes ("volcano_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "volcano_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volcano associated with the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_volcano_id FOREIGN KEY ("volcano_id") REFERENCES volcanoes ("volcano_id")
)
